svg.title: Communication Cortex block diagram
svg.desc: iBUS receiver input feeds the ESP32-S3 decision core, which mixes bounded avoidance from the SafetyPacket and outputs PPM through a CD4053 bypass to the Naza. A hardware watchdog pulse holds the bypass on the modified path.

g.text: channels R/P/T/Y · scale · rcLost / sensDead / RTH / land · blocked flags
